title: meta-aletris sumatrana
intro: Meta-aletris sumatrana, also known as Sumatran angelica or Sumatran valerian, is a plant species that belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with meta-aletris sumatrana include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of meta-aletris sumatrana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
